step_1_catalyst.catalyst_event: Dinglong 2026 H1 interim earnings release expected to confirm CMP slurry shipment ramp into YMTC/SMIC advanced nodes + first material revenue contribution from photoresist (KrF/ArF) qualification wins announced in Q1 2026
step_1_catalyst.catalyst_source: Shenzhen Exchange disclosure calendar; company IR guidance from May 2026 investor day indicating semi materials segment >50% YoY growth in H1

mechanism_chain: 1. Domestic wafer fab capex in China has structurally shifted to mature-node + storage expansion (SMIC 28nm, YMTC 232L) post US Oct-2024 export controls — these fabs must domesticate materials supply chain including CMP slurry & polishing pads.

2. Dinglong is the dominant domestic CMP polishing pad supplier (>70% China share, sole local supplier qualified at SMIC/YMTC/CXMT) and is now ramping CMP slurry (tungsten, copper, dielectric) + advanced packaging materials (TSV photoresist, hybrid bonding) — these have 2-3x gross margin of legacy printer consumables.

3. As semi materials segment moves from ~25% to ~40%+ of revenue in 2026, blended gross margin expands from ~36% (FY24) toward ~42-44%, while operating leverage on fixed R&D base drives net margin expansion faster than revenue growth (NI/Rev growth ratio >1.8x).

4. Market currently values Dinglong as a 'printer consumables company with semi optionality' at ~45x 2026E PE. As H1 2026 results print >55% segment growth + photoresist orderbook visibility, re-rating toward semi materials pure-play peers (Anji Tech 70-80x, Hubei Dinglong-equivalent multiple) drives 40-60% upside.

evidence_quantitative: FY2024 revenue 3.36B CNY (+25% YoY), semi materials segment 1.05B (+71% YoY), gross margin 35.8% (+3.1pp YoY)
FY2025 (reported Mar-2026) revenue 4.1B CNY (+22%), semi segment ~1.6B (+52%), GM 37.4% — consistent margin expansion trajectory
CMP polishing pad domestic share >70% per CINNO 2025 report; CMP slurry capacity expansion to 30k ton/yr completed Q4 2025 (per company announcement)
Photoresist: KrF qualified at 2 fabs in 2025, ArF immersion in qualification at YMTC per May 2026 investor day — first revenue contribution H2 2026
Implied: at current 4.5B FY26E revenue, semi segment 2.3B+ = 51% mix, GM trajectory to 40%+; net income CAGR 2024-2026 ~35%
evidence_qualitative: Only Chinese supplier with full CMP stack (pad + slurry + cleaning) qualified at leading domestic fabs — moat reinforced by long fab qualification cycles (18-24 months)
US Oct-2024 + Dec-2024 export controls explicitly tightened restrictions on advanced node materials, accelerating fab procurement diversification away from CMC/Versum/JSR
Management track record: founder-led, 15+ years semi materials buildout, conservative guidance pattern (beat 2024 guidance by 8%, 2025 by 6%)
Advanced packaging (TSV photoresist, temporary bonding) positions for HBM domestic supply chain — CXMT HBM ramp 2026-2027 represents incremental TAM

market_consensus.e: Consensus (sell-side 18 analysts) views Dinglong as a high-quality semi materials play but already fairly valued at 45x 2026E PE; concerns about (a) photoresist execution risk vs entrenched JSR/TOK, (b) printer consumables segment drag (40% of revenue, low growth), (c) slurry price competition from local entrants.
market_consensus.z: 市场共识：丁龙是优质半导体材料标的，但 2026E 45 倍 PE 已充分定价；担忧光刻胶执行风险、打印耗材板块拖累、浆料价格竞争。

our_variant.e: We believe consensus underestimates the segment mix shift speed: semi materials will cross 50% of revenue by end-2026 (consensus models ~45%), triggering a re-rating catalyst as Dinglong reclassifies from 'diversified materials' to 'semi materials pure-play' valuation cohort (peer Anji Tech trades 70-80x). Photoresist contribution is option value priced at zero by consensus.
our_variant.z: 我们认为市场低估了业务结构切换速度：半导体材料 2026 年底将超过 50% 收入占比（共识 ~45%），触发估值切换至半导体材料纯标的（安集科技 70-80 倍）；光刻胶贡献被市场视为零期权价值。

contrarian_view.what_changes_our_mind: If H1 2026 interim report shows semi materials segment growth <35% YoY (vs our 50%+ expectation) AND blended GM fails to reach 38%+, the segment mix shift thesis is invalidated — we exit. Equally, if photoresist KrF revenue contribution in H2 2026 disclosure is <50M CNY, the option value re-rating leg fails.

step_4_quantification.metric_target: FY2026 revenue, semi materials segment mix %, blended gross margin, and 2026E PE multiple
step_4_quantification.current_value: FY2025 revenue 4.1B CNY, semi mix 39%, GM 37.4%, trading at 45x 2026E PE (price ~38 CNY)
step_4_quantification.predicted_value: FY2026 revenue 5.2B CNY (+27%), semi mix 51%, GM 41%, re-rate to 60x 2026E PE
step_4_quantification.predicted_horizon: 9-12 months (through FY2026 annual results in Mar-2027)

step_5_proves_right_if: H1 2026 interim (Aug-2026): semi materials segment revenue YoY growth ≥50% AND segment mix ≥48%
Blended gross margin ≥39% in H1 2026 (vs 37.4% FY25)
Photoresist (KrF) revenue ≥80M CNY disclosed in H2 2026 / FY26 annual
PE multiple expansion to ≥55x 2026E within 6 months of H1 print
step_6_proves_wrong_if: H1 2026 semi materials segment growth <35% YoY (slurry pricing pressure or share loss)
Blended GM falls below 36% for 2 consecutive quarters (mix shift fails to overcome printer drag)
Photoresist qualification at YMTC fails or pushed beyond Q2 2027 per channel checks
Major fab (SMIC or YMTC) capex cut >20% announced for 2026-2027 cycle

step_7_variant_view.variant_view_one_sentence: Market believes Dinglong is fairly valued as a diversified materials co at 45x → We believe semi mix crossing 50% by end-2026 + photoresist optionality triggers re-rating to semi pure-play cohort (60-70x) → Mechanism is segment mix step-change visible in H1 2026 interim earnings.
step_7_variant_view.time_to_resolution: 9-12 months (H1 interim Aug-2026 as first proof point, FY26 annual Mar-2027 as full thesis test)

expected_pnl_asymmetry.downside_if_wrong: -18% to -22% (de-rate to 35x on missed growth, fair value floor ~30 CNY)

why_market_keeps_buying: Domestic semi self-sufficiency narrative remains dominant in A-share — Dinglong is a top-3 destocked name in materials basket
Q1 2026 results (Apr-2026) already confirmed segment trajectory; momentum buyers extrapolating
Sell-side has already raised 2026E by 5-8% post-Q1 — fresh upgrades expected post Q2
early_signs_phase_1_weakening: Channel checks indicating slurry ASP cuts >5% from new local entrants (Hubei, Anji competition)
YMTC or SMIC capex revision communicated in Q2 2026 disclosures
Photoresist qualification timeline slippage disclosed at any conference

optional_long_play.sizing: 20-30% of full conviction position ahead of H1 print
optional_long_play.exit_trigger: If price runs >15% pre-print without fundamental confirmation, trim to 10%

catalyst_for_reversion: H1 2026 interim release (Aug-2026) — semi segment mix and GM print are the binary inflection
Q3 2026 conference call (Oct-2026) — photoresist revenue contribution disclosure
phase_2_reality_recognition.estimated_timing: Aug-2026 (H1 interim) primary; Oct-2026 (Q3) secondary confirmation

short_play.sizing: N/A — this is a LONG thesis
short_play.entry_trigger: N/A; would flip to short only if H1 print fails on both segment growth AND GM

position_sizing_curve.phase_1_weakening_confirmed: 50-60% (add if mid-quarter channel checks confirm slurry shipments + photoresist progress)
position_sizing_curve.phase_2_catalyst_imminent: 75-100% (full size 2 weeks before H1 interim if pre-announcement positive)

data.name: 湖北鼎龙控股

pulse.e: Segment-mix re-rating story: semi materials crossing 50% revenue threshold in 2026 triggers valuation cohort shift; H1 interim (Aug-2026) is binary inflection. R/R 2.7:1.
pulse.z: 结构切换再估值故事：2026 年半导体材料业务占比突破 50% 触发估值切换；8 月中报为二元拐点，赔率 2.7:1。

problem.e: Chinese fabs (SMIC/YMTC/CXMT) need domestic CMP & photoresist supply post US export controls; legacy suppliers (CMC, JSR, TOK) being designed out.
problem.z: 国产晶圆厂在美国出口管制下需国产 CMP 与光刻胶供应；海外供应商正被替换。

mechanism.e: Dinglong sole local supplier with full CMP stack qualified at leading fabs; segment mix shifts from printer consumables to semi materials, driving margin and multiple re-rating.
mechanism.z: 鼎龙是唯一在头部晶圆厂全 CMP 栈认证的本土供应商；业务结构从打印耗材切换至半导体材料，驱动毛利率与估值双升。

moneyFlow.e: Semi materials GM ~50% vs printer consumables ~25%; mix shift mechanically expands blended GM 3-4pp annually 2024-2026.
moneyFlow.z: 半导体材料毛利率约 50% vs 打印耗材约 25%；结构切换 2024-2026 年每年带动综合毛利率提升 3-4pp。

marketBelieves.e: Fairly valued at 45x 2026E PE; photoresist execution risk; printer drag; slurry competition.
marketBelieves.z: 市场认为 45 倍 2026E PE 已充分定价；光刻胶执行风险、打印拖累、浆料竞争。

weBelieve.e: Semi mix crosses 50% by end-2026 (consensus ~45%), triggering valuation cohort re-rating to 60-70x like Anji Tech; photoresist priced at zero option value.
weBelieve.z: 半导体材料 2026 年底占比突破 50%（共识 ~45%），触发估值切换至安集科技梯队 60-70 倍；光刻胶期权价值为零。

mechanism.e: H1 2026 interim earnings (Aug-2026) will print semi segment growth ≥50% YoY and segment mix ≥48%, forcing sell-side to upgrade and re-classify.
mechanism.z: 8 月中报半导体材料同比增速 ≥50%、占比 ≥48%，倒逼卖方上调评级与重新归类。

rightIf.e: H1 2026: semi segment +≥50% YoY AND mix ≥48% AND blended GM ≥39%; photoresist revenue ≥80M CNY in FY26.
rightIf.z: 中报：半导体材料同比 ≥50%、占比 ≥48%、综合毛利率 ≥39%；FY26 光刻胶收入 ≥80M。

wrongIf.e: H1 2026 semi segment growth <35% YoY OR blended GM <36% for 2 consecutive quarters → exit position, thesis invalidated.
wrongIf.z: 中报半导体材料同比 <35% 或综合毛利率连续两季 <36% → 清仓，逻辑证伪。

whatChangesOurMind.e: If H1 2026 segment growth <35% AND GM <38%, OR photoresist H2 contribution <50M CNY, segment mix re-rating thesis invalidated.
whatChangesOurMind.z: 若中报半导体材料增速 <35% 且毛利率 <38%，或下半年光刻胶收入 <50M，结构切换逻辑证伪。

rewardToRisk.upsideIfRight: +45% to +65% over 9 months (re-rate 45x→60x on raised FY26 EPS)
rewardToRisk.downsideIfWrong: -18% to -22% (de-rate to 35x, fair value floor ~30 CNY)

whyMarketKeepsBuying: Domestic semi self-sufficiency narrative dominant; Dinglong top-3 in materials basket
Q1 2026 trajectory already led to sell-side upgrades; momentum continuing
earlySignsPhase1Weakening: Slurry ASP cuts >5% per channel checks (Anji/Hubei competition)
YMTC or SMIC capex revision in Q2 2026 disclosure
Photoresist qualification slippage at any conference

optionalLongPlay.sizing: 20-30% of full conviction ahead of H1 print
optionalLongPlay.exitTrigger: Trim to 10% if price runs >15% pre-print without fundamental confirmation

catalystForReversion: H1 2026 interim (Aug-2026) — semi mix and GM print = binary inflection

shortPlay.entryTrigger: Flip only if H1 misses on BOTH segment growth AND GM

catalysts.e: H1 2026 interim earnings — semi materials segment growth + mix + GM print
catalysts.z: 2026 年中报——半导体材料增速、占比、毛利率

catalysts.e: Q3 2026 results / call — photoresist KrF revenue contribution disclosure
catalysts.z: 三季报——KrF 光刻胶收入披露

catalysts.e: SEMICON China 2026 (Shanghai) — advanced packaging materials product announcements
catalysts.z: SEMICON China 2026——先进封装材料新品发布

catalysts.e: FY2026 annual results — full year segment mix confirmation
catalysts.z: 2026 年报——全年结构占比确认

expectation_gap.e: Consensus models 45% semi mix for 2026; we expect 51%+ — 6pp gap drives EPS upside and re-rate.
expectation_gap.z: 共识预计 2026 年半导体占比 45%，我们预计 51%+，6pp 缺口驱动 EPS 与估值双升。

fundamental_acc.e: NI growth ~40% vs revenue 27% = NI/Rev ratio 1.5x; clear positive operating leverage.
fundamental_acc.z: 净利增速 ~40% vs 收入 27%，NI/Rev 比率 1.5 倍，明显正向经营杠杆。

narrative_shift.e: Reclassification from 'diversified materials' to 'semi materials pure-play' is the core narrative shift.
narrative_shift.z: 从'综合材料'重新归类为'半导体材料纯标的'是核心叙事切换。

low_coverage.e: 18 sell-side analysts; well-covered but with consensus modeling gap.
low_coverage.z: 18 家卖方覆盖，覆盖充分但共识建模存在缺口。

catalyst_prox.e: H1 interim ~75 days away — high temporal proximity.
catalyst_prox.z: 中报约 75 天后——催化剂临近度高。

risks.e: Slurry ASP pressure from Anji Tech / new local entrants compressing GM
risks.z: 安集科技及新进入者浆料价格压力压缩毛利率

risks.e: Photoresist qualification at YMTC/SMIC slips beyond 2026 — option value re-rating delayed
risks.z: 光刻胶在长江存储/中芯认证延后至 2026 年后——期权价值再估值延迟

risks.e: Major fab capex cut (SMIC/YMTC) due to macro or further US restrictions
risks.z: 头部晶圆厂资本开支削减（宏观或新一轮美国管制）

risks.e: Printer consumables segment accelerates decline, dragging blended growth
risks.z: 打印耗材业务加速下滑拖累综合增速

crowd.e: Crowded long among A-share materials funds but not euphoric; -10% from Apr-2026 peak provides entry.
crowd.z: A 股材料基金多头较拥挤但未到狂热；较 4 月高点回调 10% 提供入场窗口。

nextActions.e: Channel check: 3 fab procurement contacts (SMIC, YMTC, CXMT) for Q2 2026 slurry/pad order volumes and ASP trends by end-June 2026.
nextActions.z: 渠道调研：6 月底前对接 3 家晶圆厂（中芯、长存、长鑫）采购，确认 Q2 浆料/抛光垫订单量与 ASP。

nextActions.e: Track Anji Tech (688019) Q2 2026 results (Aug-2026) for slurry pricing read-across; if Anji GM <55%, flag risk.
nextActions.z: 跟踪安集科技 Q2 业绩（8 月）作为浆料定价参照；若安集毛利率 <55%，预警风险。

nextActions.e: Model sensitivity: at 48% / 51% / 54% semi mix scenarios, compute FY26 EPS and target price for each.
nextActions.z: 建模敏感性：48%/51%/54% 半导体占比情景下分别测算 FY26 EPS 与目标价。

nextActions.e: Monitor SEMICON China 2026 (Jun-17) product launches — TSV photoresist or hybrid bonding material disclosures.
nextActions.z: 关注 SEMICON China 2026（6 月 17 日）TSV 光刻胶/混合键合材料发布。

nextActions.e: Initiate 25% starter position now; scale to 50% post-channel check confirmation; full size 2 weeks before H1 interim.
nextActions.z: 立即建立 25% 底仓；渠道确认后加至 50%；中报前两周加至满仓。

fin_insights: NI/Rev growth ratio FY25: 39% / 22% = 1.77x — strong positive operating leverage as semi materials mix lifts blended margins faster than revenue scaling.
Profit scissors spread: GM expansion FY22→FY25: 31.0% → 32.7% → 35.8% → 37.4%, +6.4pp over 3 years; 3-year direction clearly expanding, accelerating with semi mix shift.

Implied growth check: at 45x 2026E PE, mean-reverting to A-share semi materials median 30x in 3yr implies ~22% EPS CAGR required — slightly above consensus 18% but well within our 28% base case if semi mix crosses 50%.

Balance sheet: net debt/equity ~0.8% (near net-cash); FCF conversion 62% of net income (FY25 420M / 680M) — capex-heavy phase with slurry capacity expansion completed; FCF conversion expected to improve toward 75%+ in FY26.
